days.summary: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Nano Omni emerged as the clearest product artifact, launching as an open multimodal model across Together AI and Amazon SageMaker JumpStart on day one for video, image, audio, and text workloads. ByteDance Seed also surfaced with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and a new Full-Duplex Speech LLM, while Glean introduced Waldo, its first agentic search model, signaling continued enterprise competition around multimodal and workflow-native AI systems.
